Battery.recommendation: Inspect the battery pack, charging circuit, BMS, and cell balancing. Replace degraded battery modules if necessary.

Motor.recommendation: Inspect motor bearings, cooling system, rotor alignment, and electrical insulation.

Brake.recommendation: Inspect brake pads, brake fluid, calipers, and regenerative braking performance.

Electrical.recommendation: Run ECU diagnostics, inspect vehicle wiring, connectors, and power electronics.

General.recommendation: Continue monitoring vehicle telemetry and schedule preventive maintenance.
